stem:
On March 23, 2021, a gust of wind wreaked havoc on global trade. Ever Given, an international shipping container vessel, became lodged in Egypt’s Suez Canal, a major shipping route between Europe and Asia. The vessel took six days to _______ it’s as heavy as two thousand blue whales when fully loaded.

Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
choices: dislodge in part due to its sheer size,
dislodge, in part due to its sheer size:
dislodge, in part due to its sheer size,
dislodge, in part, due to its sheer size
answer: dislodge, in part due to its sheer size:
explanation: A comma sets off the supplementary phrase “in part due to its sheer size,” and a colon then introduces the second main clause explaining the vessel’s weight. The other options create comma splices or a run-on by failing to separate the two independent clauses correctly.
